tiny_practice.action: Take a deep breath and silently ask God to reveal any worldly desires competing with your devotion to Him

two_step.reflect_question: Where am I seeking my own pleasure instead of God's purpose?

options.response: Pray for alignment with God's calling and seek His guidance
Examine motives and ask God to purify your heart
Identify and surrender areas of self-indulgence to God

creative_prompt.instruction: Draw a picture of yourself with two paths: one leading toward worldly desires and one leading toward God

reevaluation.question: How has reading this chapter changed your understanding of spiritual warfare?
options: I see conflict as more internal than external
I recognize my own tendency to prioritize self
I understand the importance of submitting to God
I want to be more intentional about resisting worldly influences

three_choice.question: Which central insight about human desire and conflict resonates most deeply?

choices.expansion: Our unmet inner cravings generate relational and spiritual warfare.
Aligning with temporal values inevitably distances us from spiritual intimacy.
Authentic communication with God demands genuine, selfless intentionality.

socratic_nudge.question: If your deepest desires were transparently visible to everyone, what would they reveal about your true spiritual orientation?

moral_slider.question: How do personal ambitions relate to spiritual submission?

reevaluation.question: How has your perspective on personal desires and spiritual growth shifted?
options: I now see conflicts as spiritual symptoms
My prayer life needs motivational refinement
I'm more aware of internal spiritual dynamics

thematic_summaries.title: Spiritual Warfare of Internal Desires
thematic_summaries.summary: James reveals the root of human conflict originates from uncontrolled internal desires and selfish motivations. He exposes how unchecked personal passions lead to relational destruction and spiritual separation from God.

thematic_summaries.title: Worldliness vs. Divine Friendship
thematic_summaries.summary: The chapter emphasizes the incompatibility between worldly allegiances and genuine spiritual relationship with God. James challenges believers to recognize that pursuing worldly pleasures creates spiritual enmity with divine purposes.

reevaluation.question: How do personal desires compromise spiritual authenticity?
options: Internal conflicts reflect deeper spiritual struggles
Personal ambitions can become idolatrous substitutes for divine relationship
